en: On a Sabbath, while he was going through the grainfields, his disciples plucked and ate some heads of grain, rubbing them in their hands.
zh: 有一個安息日，耶穌從麥田經過，他的門徒摘了麥穗，用手搓著吃。

en: But some of the Pharisees said, "Why are you doing what is not lawful to do on the Sabbath?"
zh: 有幾個法利賽人說：“你們為甚麼作安息日不可作的事呢？”

en: And Jesus answered them, "Have you not read what David did when he was hungry, he and those who were with him:
zh: 耶穌回答：“大衛和跟他在一起的人，在飢餓的時候所作的，你們沒有念過嗎？

en: how he entered the house of God and took and ate the bread of the Presence, which is not lawful for any but the priests to eat, and also gave it to those with him?"
zh: 他不是進了 神的殿，吃了陳設餅，也給跟他在一起的人吃嗎？這餅除了祭司以外，別的人是不可以吃的。”

en: And he said to them, "The Son of Man is lord of the Sabbath."
zh: 他又對他們說：“人子是安息日的主。”

en: On another Sabbath, he entered the synagogue and was teaching, and a man was there whose right hand was withered.
zh: 另一個安息日，耶穌進入會堂教導人，在那裡有一個人，右手枯乾，

en: And the scribes and the Pharisees watched him, to see whether he would heal on the Sabbath, so that they might find a reason to accuse him.
zh: 經學家和法利賽人要看他會不會在安息日治病，好找把柄控告他。

en: But he knew their thoughts, and he said to the man with the withered hand, "Come and stand here." And he rose and stood there.
zh: 耶穌知道他們的意念，就對那一隻手枯乾了的人說：“起來，站在當中！”那人就起來站著。

en: And Jesus said to them, "I ask you, is it lawful on the Sabbath to do good or to do harm, to save life or to destroy it?"
zh: 耶穌對他們說：“我問你們：在安息日哪一樣是可以作的呢：作好事還是壞事？救命還是害命？”

en: And after looking around at them all he said to him, "Stretch out your hand." And he did so, and his hand was restored.
zh: 他環視周圍所有的人，就對那人說：“伸出你的手來！”他把手一伸，手就復原了。

en: But they were filled with fury and discussed with one another what they might do to Jesus.
zh: 他們卻大怒，彼此商議怎樣對付耶穌。

en: In these days he went out to the mountain to pray, and all night he continued in prayer to God.
zh: 在那些日子，有一次耶穌出去到山上禱告，整夜禱告 神。

en: And when day came, he called his disciples and chose from them twelve, whom he named apostles:
zh: 天亮以後，他把門徒叫來，從他們中間挑選了十二個人，稱他們為使徒，

en: Simon, whom he named Peter, and Andrew his brother, and James and John, and Philip, and Bartholomew,
zh: 就是西門 ，和他弟弟安得烈，以及雅各、約翰、腓力、巴多羅邁、

en: and Matthew, and Thomas, and James the son of Alphaeus, and Simon who was called the Zealot,
zh: 馬太、多馬、亞勒腓的兒子雅各、稱為激進派的西門、

en: and Judas the son of James, and Judas Iscariot, who became a traitor.
zh: 雅各的兒子猶大，和出賣主的加略人猶大。

en: And he came down with them and stood on a level place, with a great crowd of his disciples and a great multitude of people from all Judea and Jerusalem and the seacoast of Tyre and Sidon,
zh: 耶穌和他們下了山，站在平地上，有一大群門徒同他在一起，又有一大批從猶太全地、耶路撒冷和推羅、西頓海邊來的人。

en: who came to hear him and to be healed of their diseases. And those who were troubled with unclean spirits were cured.
zh: 他們要聽他講道，也要他們的疾病得醫好。還有一些被污靈纏擾的也痊愈了。

en: And all the crowd sought to touch him, for power came out from him and healed them all.
zh: 群眾都設法摸他，因為有能 力從他身上出來，治好眾人。

en: And he lifted up his eyes on his disciples, and said: "Blessed are you who are poor, for yours is the kingdom of God.
zh: 耶穌抬頭看著門徒，說： “貧窮的人有福了， 因為 神的國是你們的。

en: "Blessed are you who are hungry now, for you shall be satisfied. "Blessed are you who weep now, for you shall laugh.
zh: 飢餓的人有福了， 因為你們要得飽足。 哀哭的人有福了， 因為你們將要喜樂。

en: "Blessed are you when people hate you and when they exclude you and revile you and spurn your name as evil, on account of the Son of Man!
zh: 世人為人子的緣故憎恨你們、排斥你們、辱罵你們，棄絕你們的名好像棄絕惡物，你們就有福了。

en: Rejoice in that day, and leap for joy, for behold, your reward is great in heaven; for so their fathers did to the prophets.
zh: 那時你們應該歡喜跳躍，因為你們在天上的賞賜是大的，他們的祖先對待先知也是這樣。

en: "But woe to you who are rich, for you have received your consolation.
zh: “然而你們富有的人有禍了， 因為你們已經得了你們的安慰。

en: "Woe to you who are full now, for you shall be hungry. "Woe to you who laugh now, for you shall mourn and weep.
zh: 你們飽足的人有禍了， 因為你們將要飢餓。 你們喜樂的人有禍了， 因為你們將要痛哭。

en: "Woe to you, when all people speak well of you, for so their fathers did to the false prophets.
zh: 人都說你們好的時候，你們就有禍了，因為你們的祖先對待假先知也是這樣。

en: "But I say to you who hear, Love your enemies, do good to those who hate you,
zh: “只是我告訴你們聽道的人：當愛你們的仇敵，善待恨你們的人。

en: bless those who curse you, pray for those who abuse you.
zh: 咒詛你們的，要為他們祝福，凌辱你們的，要為他們禱告。

en: To one who strikes you on the cheek, offer the other also, and from one who takes away your cloak do not withhold your tunic either.
zh: 有人打你一邊的臉，把另一邊也轉給他打；有人拿你的外衣，連內衣也讓他拿去。

en: Give to everyone who begs from you, and from one who takes away your goods do not demand them back.
zh: 向你求的，就給他；有人拿去你的東西，不用再要回來。

en: And as you wish that others would do to you, do so to them.
zh: 你們願意人怎樣待你們，你們就應當怎樣待人。

en: "If you love those who love you, what benefit is that to you? For even sinners love those who love them.
zh: 如果單愛那些愛你們的人，那有甚麼好處呢？罪人也愛那些愛他們的人。

en: And if you do good to those who do good to you, what benefit is that to you? For even sinners do the same.
zh: 如果只善待那些善待你們的人，那有甚麼好處呢？罪人也會這樣行。

en: And if you lend to those from whom you expect to receive, what credit is that to you? Even sinners lend to sinners, to get back the same amount.
zh: 如果借給人，又指望向人收回，那有甚麼好處呢？罪人也借給罪人，要如數收回。

en: But love your enemies, and do good, and lend, expecting nothing in return, and your reward will be great, and you will be sons of the Most High, for he is kind to the ungrateful and the evil.
zh: 你們要愛仇敵，善待他們；借出去，不要指望償還；這樣你們的賞賜就大了，你們也必作至高者的兒子，因為 神自己也寬待忘恩的和惡人。

en: Be merciful, even as your Father is merciful.
zh: 你們要仁慈像你們的父仁慈一樣。

en: "Judge not, and you will not be judged; condemn not, and you will not be condemned; forgive, and you will be forgiven;
zh: “你們不要判斷人，就必不受判斷；不要定人的罪，就必不被定罪；要饒恕人，就必蒙饒恕；

en: give, and it will be given to you. Good measure, pressed down, shaken together, running over, will be put into your lap. For with the measure you use it will be measured back to you."
zh: 要給人，就必有給你們的；並且要用十足的升斗，連按帶搖，上尖下流地倒在你們懷裡；因為你們用甚麼升斗量給人，就必用甚麼升斗量給你們。”

en: He also told them a parable: "Can a blind man lead a blind man? Will they not both fall into a pit?
zh: 耶穌又用比喻對他們說：“瞎子怎能給瞎子領路呢？兩個人不都要掉在坑裡嗎？

en: A disciple is not above his teacher, but everyone when he is fully trained will be like his teacher.
zh: 學生不能勝過老師，所有學成的，不過和老師一樣。

en: Why do you see the speck that is in your brother's eye, but do not notice the log that is in your own eye?
zh: 為甚麼看得見你弟兄眼中的木屑，卻想不到自己眼中的梁木呢？

en: How can you say to your brother, 'Brother, let me take out the speck that is in your eye,' when you yourself do not see the log that is in your own eye? You hypocrite, first take the log out of your own eye, and then you will see clearly to take out the speck that is in your brother's eye.
zh: 你不看見自己眼中的梁木，怎能對你弟兄說：‘弟兄，容我除去你眼中的木屑’呢？偽君子啊！先去掉自己眼中的梁木，才能看得清楚，好去掉弟兄眼中的木屑。

en: "For no good tree bears bad fruit, nor again does a bad tree bear good fruit,
zh: “因為好樹不能結壞果子，壞樹不能結好果子。

en: for each tree is known by its own fruit. For figs are not gathered from thornbushes, nor are grapes picked from a bramble bush.
zh: 憑著果子就可以認出樹來。人不能從荊棘上採無花果，也不能從蒺藜裡摘葡萄。

en: The good person out of the good treasure of his heart produces good, and the evil person out of his evil treasure produces evil, for out of the abundance of the heart his mouth speaks.
zh: 良善的人從心中所存的良善發出良善，邪惡的人從心中所存的邪惡發出邪惡；因為心中所充滿的，口裡就說出來。

en: "Why do you call me 'Lord, Lord,' and not do what I tell you?
zh: “你們為甚麼稱呼我‘主啊！主啊！’卻不遵行我的吩咐呢？

en: Everyone who comes to me and hears my words and does them, I will show you what he is like:
zh: 每一個到我跟前，聽我的話並且去行的，我要指示你們他像甚麼人。

en: he is like a man building a house, who dug deep and laid the foundation on the rock. And when a flood arose, the stream broke against that house and could not shake it, because it had been well built.
zh: 他像一個人建造房屋，挖深了地，把根基建在磐石上。大水氾濫的時候，急流沖擊那房屋，不能使它動搖，因為它建造得好。

en: But the one who hears and does not do them is like a man who built a house on the ground without a foundation. When the stream broke against it, immediately it fell, and the ruin of that house was great."
zh: 但那聽見而不遵行的，就像人在地上建屋，沒有根基，急流一沖，就立刻倒塌，毀壞得很厲害。”
